response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but their profile is heavily skewed towards web and mobile technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, React, etc.) rather than C++ or industrial automation. Their C++ experience is limited to early roles (2014–2015) and does not reflect the 8–12 years of deep C++ expertise required for this role. Additionally, there is no evidence of work with industrial automation protocols, cloud platforms, or cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience with modern web technologies (Node.js, React, TypeScript).
Proven ability to build scalable systems (handling millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects (GISCollective) and developer tooling.
concerns: Lacks recent and deep C++ experience required for the role (last C++ work was ~9 years ago).
No evidence of industrial automation, IoT, or protocol expertise (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA, etc.).
No mention of cloud platform experience (Azure) or secure development lifecycle practices (IEC 62443).
